title: JSX list components keys should match up between renders
description: JSX list components keys should match up between rendersAnalyze your codeintentionality-efficientmaintainabilityCode SmellreactjsxperformanceWhy is this an issue?More InfoTo optimize the rendering of React list components, a unique identifier (UID) is required in thekeyattribute for each list item. This UID lets React identify the item throughout its lifetime. Using generated values likeMath.random()orDate.now()is discouraged as their return value will differ between calls, causing the keys to not match up between renders, recreating the DOM.
recommendation: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.

checks.message: Avoid using Math.random() for JSX keys - use stable unique identifiers instead.
Avoid using Date.now() for JSX keys - use stable unique identifiers instead.
Avoid using date/time values for JSX keys - use stable unique identifiers instead.
Using array index as JSX key can cause rendering issues - use stable unique identifiers when possible.
Using array index as JSX key may cause issues - prefer stable unique identifiers.
Avoid using random numbers for JSX keys - use stable unique identifiers instead.
